name: US Cash Advance
description_short: US Cash Advance at 3328 W 32nd St unit 104, Cleveland, OH 44109 in the Clark - Fulton neighborhood is Mon-Fri 8:00 AM – 9:00 PM. Google reviewers rate the branch 4.4 stars across 16 reviews. Call +1 216-777-5629.
description_long:
US Cash Advance operates a physical location at 20002 Schoolcraft Rd, Detroit, MI 48223, with a corporate address listed in Charlotte, NC. The company functions primarily as a loan-matching intermediary, connecting borrowers who fill out an online inquiry form with third-party lenders who then extend actual credit offers. It is not a direct lender. The Detroit branch maintains extended hours seven days a week and has received customer praise for its in-person service.

The company markets several loan products: payday loans and cash advances capped at $1,000, bad credit loans ranging from $250 to $50,000, same-day loans, quick loans, personal loans for bad credit, loans without a credit check, debt consolidation, and general cash loans. All products are described as unsecured, requiring no collateral. The application process is straightforward: submit an online inquiry form, get connected to a third-party lender, review the offer, sign the contract, and receive funds.

What distinguishes US Cash Advance at the Detroit location is its seven-day availability with late weekday hours (8am–9pm Monday through Friday), which accommodates working borrowers who cannot visit during standard business hours. Customer reviews specifically name an in-person associate who was praised for transparency, patience, and upfront communication on repayment terms. The company's stated 4.4 'Excellent' rating reflects a reasonably positive customer experience for the payday loan segment.

However, prospective borrowers should note several meaningful limitations. Because US Cash Advance acts as a lead-generation and matching service rather than a direct lender, the actual APR, fee structure, and repayment terms are set by whichever third-party lender accepts the application — none of this is disclosed on the website. The contact email uses a hosting-provider subdomain (kinsta.cloud) rather than a branded corporate address, which is an unusual signal for a financial services company. Borrowers comparing options should treat the $50,000 upper figure as a ceiling available through the network of third-party partners, not a loan US Cash Advance itself underwrites.
pros: Open seven days a week including evenings (Mon–Fri 8am–9pm, Sat–Sun 10am–7pm)
Accepts all credit types including bad credit and no-credit-check applicants
No collateral required — all listed products are unsecured
Wide loan range: $100–$1,000 for payday/cash advance, up to $50,000 for bad credit loans
In-person Detroit location with staff praised in reviews for transparent, no-pressure service
Fast process — one reviewer reported full approval and funding within 45 minutes in-store
Customer rating of 4.4 (Excellent) across multiple reviewers
cons: Not a direct lender — borrowers are matched to unnamed third-party lenders whose rates and terms are unknown before applying
APR, fees, and total cost of borrowing are not disclosed anywhere on the website
Official contact email uses a hosting-provider domain (kinsta.cloud), not a branded corporate address
Single physical location in Detroit; online applicants may be routed to lenders with no local presence or accountability
Loan product descriptions are generic and appear shared across many similar lead-gen sites, limiting ability to verify actual underwriting standards
best_for: Detroit-area residents who need in-person same-day payday loan or cash advance assistance
Borrowers with bad or no credit who need small amounts ($100–$1,000) quickly and have been turned down elsewhere
First-time borrowers who want face-to-face guidance through a loan application
Borrowers willing to compare third-party offers for larger bad credit personal loans up to $50,000
diagnosis: US Cash Advance is best for Detroit-area borrowers with poor credit who need $100–$1,000 quickly and prefer in-person service over fully online applications. The critical caveat is that it is a loan connector, not a direct lender — actual rates, fees, and approval are determined by third-party lenders whose terms are not disclosed upfront, so borrowers should review any offer carefully before signing.
services: In-person loan application at Detroit storefront
